mapper.select: SELECT symbol, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, previous_close, quote_time, raw_json, fetched_at FROM stock_quote_cache WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_quote_cache ( symbol, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, previous_close, quote_time, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{currentPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{previousClose}, #{quoteTime}, #{rawJson}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_price = VALUES(current_price), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), previous_close = VALUES(previous_close), quote_time = VALUES(quote_time), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
